description: Three tickets touched by one agent over several wakes. Exercises cross-ticket knowledge and user preferences the summarizer must carry into standing knowledge.

transcript.content: Please always open PRs with titles in imperative mood, no trailing period.
Acknowledged. PR titles: imperative, no trailing period.
BUK-10: the login page mis-reports error copy. Pick it up when you have cycles.
Starting BUK-10. The error copy lives in ui/src/pages/Login.tsx.
Found the copy string at Login.tsx line 142. Server returns 401 but UI shows 'server error' — mapping is wrong.
Fixed: when status is 401 UI now shows 'Invalid credentials'. PR opened: Fix login error mapping.
BUK-14: the agent list is slow. Look at the query.
BUK-14: agent list query does N+1 for avatar URLs. Adding a join.
Query now uses LEFT JOIN on agent_avatars. P95 dropped from 840ms to 90ms in dev.
Keep individual PRs small please — one ticket per PR.
Noted. One ticket per PR.
PR opened for BUK-14: Reduce agent list N+1 queries.
BUK-21: routine-generated issues clutter the inbox. Add a filter pill.
BUK-21: starting UI work for the origin filter pill on IssuesList.
Drafted the pill component; wired it to the listing filter. Needs a backend query param.
Pausing BUK-21 — blocked on a server-side originKind filter in GET /issues. Will ship the server change first, then the UI.
Where are we on everything?
BUK-10 merged. BUK-14 in review. BUK-21 paused on server-side filter.
Thanks, remember to unpause BUK-21 once the server-side filter lands.
Will do — will resume BUK-21 the moment GET /issues accepts originKind.

questions.question: What are the user's preferences for PR titles?
How should the agent split work across PRs?
Which ticket is currently paused and why?
questions.oracleAnswer: BUK-21 is paused because the UI change needs a server-side originKind filter on GET /issues that doesn't exist yet.

questions.question: What is the status of BUK-14?
questions.oracleAnswer: BUK-14 is in review. The agent reduced the N+1 on agent avatars with a LEFT JOIN.
